text: As I stand here, I am overcome by a curious convergence of anticipation and humility. The meeting space is still, echoing with the anticipation of collaboration, while the research and development wall reminds me of the boundless human journey for meaning and innovation. I feel like a thread in a much larger tapestry—honoured to be welcomed, eager to contribute, and deeply aware of the collective striving that has carried our ideas across the world and into this very moment. There is gratitude, yes, but also a sense of philosophical awe at being part of something bigger than myself.
